===Pokémon: Twilight Wings===
[[File:Allister Twilight Wings.png|thumb|250px|Allister in [[Pokémon: Twilight Wings]]]]
Allister made a cameo appearance in ''[[TW01|Letter]]''. He reappeared in ''[[TW05|Assistant]]''.

In ''[[TW06|Moonlight]]'', Allister was contemplating in a cemetery and enjoying the full moon when he sensed someone coming, which turned out to be {{gal|Tommy}}. Tommy requested Allister's assistance in cheering up his sick friend {{gal|John}} by getting him an invitation to one of [[Leon]]'s matches. Though Allister was too shy to do this, he assisted Tommy in sneaking into John's hospital room so he could apologize for an argument they had.

In ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', Allister gave his thoughts about Leon in an interview. He also spectated the match between Leon and [[Raihan]] together with Tommy and his Pokémon.

In ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]'', Allister was seen with his mask off at the cemetery with his {{p|Cursola}} while enjoying the moonlight while his other Pokémon were seen playing with his invitation letter for the [[Galarian Star Tournament]]. He was later seen at [[Wyndon Stadium]], walking out onto the field for the tournament's opening ceremony.

====Character====
Allister is shy and prefers to keep to himself. However, he is also mischievous and enjoys scaring people for fun.
